IT IS FIXED.... AFTER YOU UPDATED TO LATEST MAKE SURE YOU OPEN THE PROGRAM USING ( FirewallSubsystemAggregator ) WHICH IS C:\Program Files (x86)\FirewallSubsystemAggregator

there you updater updated the program but opened the previous uninstalled stale window so now it is working all fixed RDP is working now... FML

content: about the audio,  when you match the VM screen display with the host monitor display. Let's say your host PC display setting is 1024x768. most sure  your VM display is closer to that. The closer you are to that, the clearer the voice will become. Let's say make your VM display settings 1024x600, the voice should be fine once  you do full screen on your VM, to show your area on the camera, and go back to normal small size after that.
